name: DogPhoria
notes: Closest on-corridor competitor. Sunday hours are a major weakness (only 2 hrs). Multi-dog boarding: $115/2 dogs · $180/3 dogs. $25 late pickup after 12pm.

name: VCA Pets Are People Too
notes: Medical boarding only — not a daycare competitor. Same road. Potential referral partner for post-surgical or medicated dogs.

name: Puppy Haven Brookhaven
notes: Multi-location (Buckhead + Chastain locations too). Evaluation required ($29.95); first night free after eval. Rewards points program. Indoor/outdoor play yards. MISSED in initial research — found via Google Maps screenshot.

name: Dogtopia of North Brookhaven
address: 2152 Johnson Ferry Rd NE, Atlanta GA 30319
column26: National franchise. Membership/enrollment model. Open-play boarding (no kennel runs). Suite non-enrolled: $85/night.

name: Camp Run-A-Mutt Dunwoody
address: 5486 Chamblee Dunwoody Rd Suite 16C, Dunwoody GA 30338
column26: 100% cage-free. Muttcam livestream. No Sunday daycare = direct gap opportunity. Holiday boarding $75/night. 5-day pkg $38.80/day, 10-day pkg $35/day.

name: Bark & Board Brookhaven
notes: 2 Atlanta locations. First day free. Large kennels not crates. 360+ reviews. Intro: $99/first 30 days unlimited.

name: Atlanta Pet Resort — Dunwoody
address: 4343 Dunwoody Park Suite G, Dunwoody GA 30338
services: Daycare, Boarding, Grooming, Training, Pet Sitting
notes: Value pricing — cheapest confirmed daycare in market ($32/day). Very limited Saturday (10am–2pm only). Half-day: $20.

name: Barking Hound Village — Sandy Springs
notes: Part of BHV 7-location Atlanta chain. No Chamblee/north DeKalb location. Book via app.

name: Barking Hound Village — Buckhead
notes: Premium Buckhead location. Indoor climate-controlled play yard.

name: Barking Hound Village — Cheshire Bridge
address: Cheshire Bridge Rd NE, Atlanta GA
notes: BHV chain location. Furthest from property.

name: Central Bark Atlanta
notes: Enrichment daycare positioning — structured activities vs. free play.

name: Shaggy and Scrub LLC
notes: Individual operator (SaMira Le'Noir). Est. 2022. Payments via Venmo/Apple Pay/Cash — suggests small/home-based scale. Doraville location ~1.8 mi. NOT a facility-scale competitor but serves same catchment. Open 7 days.

name: Camp Woof Tucker
notes: Multi-location (Tucker + Norcross + Toco Hills). OPEN SUNDAYS 9am-6pm — rare among competitors. $35/night for sibling sharing kennel. East-corridor competitor (Tucker). 5-7 mi east of property.

name: My Brothers Keeper Kennel
notes: DISQUALIFIED — user confirmed this is someone's house, not a facility. Appears on Google Maps but not a real competitor.
